name_en: M40309 Mini Mahjong Bag! MIMIPOCHETTE. A versatile mini bag suitable for storing cosmetics or various personal items, making it effortless. Super cute, an iPhone small size without a case ➕ lipstick ➕ tissues ➕ keys ➕ ID card... fits perfectly inside! Size: 16.5 x 10 x 3 cm
